summary: This electricity notice requires payment of ₹1,250 by 10 July 2026.
action: Pay ₹1,250 through the official portal by 10 July 2026.
follow_up: Pay ₹1,250 through the official electricity portal by 10 July 2026.

summary: इस बिजली सूचना में ₹1,250 का भुगतान 10 जुलाई 2026 तक करना है।
